expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md states Phase 5b requires: “Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit `[ANALOG-GATE]` entries...” and “The release recommendation must enumerate all `[ANALOG-GATE]` items that remain blocking before ship.” This explicitly covers historical analogs as required-before-ship (blocking) gates.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md includes “Phase alignment: Phase 5b” and ties enforcement to `skill_snapshot/references/review-rubric-phase5b.md`, listing Phase 5b required outputs (`checkpoint_audit`, `checkpoint_delta`, `qa_plan_phase5b` draft) and noting analog-gate enforcement is located in Phase 5b Release Recommendation rules.
